title: Add in-app OpenClaw native cron manager to Mission Control settings
summary: Implemented OpenClaw cron management APIs and a Settings UI panel for create/list/run/disable/remove/history operations without terminal usage.
changes: Added node-runtime CLI wrapper for `openclaw cron` operations.
Added cron API endpoints for status/list/create and per-ID action commands.
Added Settings UI section for full in-app cron operations.
Wired create flow to mission-control trigger endpoint contract.
risks: Requires `openclaw` binary to be installed and available in runtime PATH.
CLI output format may vary across OpenClaw versions; current UI displays raw output safely.
rollback: Remove cron API routes and Settings section; continue using `scripts/pi/openclaw-cron-wire.sh` terminal flow.
